name: services.background-task
title: Status Services Background Task
description: A status report of the device's background task details.

subkeys.content: A status report of a background task.

subkeys.title: Identifier
subkeys.content: The background task UUID which the system uses as the primary key.

subkeys.title: Indicates removal of a background task.
subkeys.content: If `true`, the background task is removed and the status item object only contains this key and the `identifier` key.

subkeys.title: Code signature
subkeys.content: For types other than `agent` or `daemon`, this is the code signature designated requirement of the item, if available.

subkeys.title: Numeric user identifier
subkeys.content: The numeric user identifier of the owner of the background task.

subkeys.title: Path
subkeys.content: For an `agent` or `daemon`, the path to the `launchd` `plist` file. For other types, the path to the app or the document.

subkeys.title: Background task type
subkeys.content: The daemon, agent, or SFL login item type.

subkeys.title: Launchd background task
subkeys.content: Details about a `launchd`-based background task, which is only present when the type is `daemon` or `agent`.

subkeys.title: Label
subkeys.content: The label of the `launchd`-based background task.

subkeys.title: Program
subkeys.content: The program that the `launchd` `plist` file specifies.

subkeys.title: Program arguments
subkeys.content: The program arguments that the `launchd` `plist` file specifies.

subkeys.title: The hash value of the launchd plist.
subkeys.content: The hash value of the `launchd` `plist` file.

subkeys.title: Device Management
subkeys.content: A dictionary that indicates a `ServicesBackgroundTasks` configuration created this background task. The dictionary contains properties that identify the configuration and the declaration asset that provided the launchd plist for the task.

subkeys.title: Configuration Identifier
subkeys.content: The identifier of the `ServicesBackgroundTasks` configuration that created this task.

subkeys.title: Asset Identifier
subkeys.content: The `Identifier` of the declaration asset that provided the launchd plist for this task.

subkeys.title: Asset Server Token
subkeys.content: The `ServerToken` of the declaration asset that provided the launchd plist for this task.
